title: cyclosorus distans
intro: Cyclosorus distans, also known as the scattered ironfern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus distans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
